heading: Imposition of tax

children.text: crude oil received at a United States refinery, and
petroleum products entered into the United States for consumption, use, or warehousing.

children.heading: Tax on certain uses and exportation
children.label: b Tax on certain uses and exportation
A
children.text: any domestic crude oil is used in or exported from the United States, and

children.label: B
children.text: before such use or exportation, no tax was imposed on such crude oil under subsection (a),

children.heading: Exception for use on premises where produced
children.label: 2 Exception for use on premises where produced
children.text: Paragraph (1) shall not apply to any use of crude oil for extracting oil or natural gas on the premises where such crude oil was produced.

children.label: A
children.text: the Hazardous Substance Superfund financing rate, and

children.label: B
children.text: the Oil Spill Liability Trust Fund financing rate.

children.label: A
children.text: the Hazardous Substance Superfund financing rate is 16.4 cents a barrel, and

children.label: i
children.text: in the case of crude oil received or petroleum products entered before , 8 cents a barrel, andJanuary 1, 2017

children.label: ii
children.text: in the case of crude oil received or petroleum products entered after , 9 cents a barrel.December 31, 2016

children.label: ii
children.text: the cost-of-living adjustment determined under section 1(f)(3) for the calendar year, determined by substituting “calendar year 2022” for “calendar year 2016” in subparagraph (A)(ii) thereof.

children.heading: Rounding
children.label: B Rounding
children.text: If any amount as adjusted under subparagraph (A) is not a multiple of $0.01, such amount shall be rounded to the next lowest multiple of $0.01.

children.heading: Crude oil received at refinery
children.label: 1 Crude oil received at refinery
children.text: The tax imposed by subsection (a)(1) shall be paid by the operator of the United States refinery.

children.heading: Imported petroleum product
children.label: 2 Imported petroleum product
children.text: The tax imposed by subsection (a)(2) shall be paid by the person entering the product for consumption, use, or warehousing.

children.heading: Tax on certain uses or exports
children.label: 3 Tax on certain uses or exports
children.text: The tax imposed by subsection (b) shall be paid by the person using or exporting the crude oil, as the case may be.

children.heading: Application of Oil Spill Liability Trust Fund financing rate
children.label: f Application of Oil Spill Liability Trust Fund financing rate

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), the Oil Spill Liability Trust Fund financing rate under subsection (c) shall apply on and after , or if later, the date which is 30 days after the last day of any calendar quarter for which the Secretary estimates that, as of the close of that quarter, the unobligated balance in the Oil Spill Liability Trust Fund is less than $2,000,000,000.April 1, 2006

children.heading: Termination
children.label: 2 Termination
children.text: The Oil Spill Liability Trust Fund financing rate shall not apply after .December 31, 2025
